title: SICP 3.5 random streams and Monte Carlo streams
goal: Add tests/sicp/ch3_stream_random_monte_carlo.esk covering random-number streams, Cesaro/Monte Carlo stream estimates, deterministic seeding, and bounded stream sampling.
acceptance: ICC observes sicp_ch3_stream_random_monte_carlo_r and sicp_ch3_stream_random_monte_carlo_aot PASS
ux_payoff: Completes the random-stream Monte Carlo material without flaky nondeterminism.
